article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
STAR ATLAS #256 Crazy New Insights From ‘NEW PLAYER PROFILE’
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of updates about Star Atlas.
Star Atlas: Starbased Mobile
Beyond the Horizon posted a video of playing Star Atlas SAGE on a smartphone.
Metaverse Nomads #170 Star Atlas
Metaverse Nomads posted their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
From $0 to $250 Million: The Star Atlas Journey | Interview with CEO Michael Wagner
Star Atlas CEO Michael Wagner was interviewed by PlayToEarn.
Weekly Star Atlas Newsletter #153
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
The Atlas Brew 134 Surge
Star Atlas TV posted a video recording of the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas Starts the Golden Carnival on Solana: Win Your Share of the $4 Million Lootfest!
Star Atlas published an article about the Golden Carnival event.
